description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content; FAQs / progressive disclosure. type="single|multiple"; AccordionItem/Trigger/Content.
name: accordion
title: Accordion

description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response; destructive/irreversible confirmations. AlertDialog + …Content/Overlay/Trigger/Close.
name: alert-dialog
title: Alert Dialog

description: displays a callout for user attention; inline, non-blocking messages (info, success, warning, error)
name: alert
title: Alert

description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user. size. Stack → avatar-stack.tsx ( 605:6567).
name: avatar-stack
title: Avatar Stack

description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user. size. Stack → avatar-stack.tsx ( 605:6567).
name: avatar
title: Avatar

description: displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge; label/categorize items or show counts/status
name: badge
title: Badge

description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links; navigation context in deep pages. Breadcrumb/List/Item/Link/Page/Separator/Ellipsis.
name: breadcrumb
title: Breadcrumb

description: A joined row of buttons that share borders; grouped related actions. orientation.
name: button-group
title: Button Group

description: displays a button or a component that looks like a button; primary actions, form submits, dialog/menu triggers
name: button
title: Button

description: A date field component that allows users to select dates; standalone or inside date-picker. react-day-picker; calendar/header, /day compose.
name: calendar
title: Calendar

description: displays a card with header, content, and footer; group related content and actions into a surface
name: card
title: Card

description: A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla; browse a set of images/cards. orientation. With-image variant 950:4542.
name: carousel
title: Carousel

description: A labeled checkbox control; when the checkbox needs an inline label/description. variant + size. Group: 1085:8757.
name: checkbox-button
title: Checkbox Button

description: a control that toggles between checked and not checked; opt-in/agree or multi-select lists
name: checkbox
title: Checkbox

description: Autocomplete input with a list of suggestions (popover + command); searchable single-select over many options. size. (Figma "Select" set on dropdown-menu page — Part 4.)
name: combobox
title: Combobox

description: Fast, composable command menu; command palettes and quick search/launchers. Command/Input/List/Empty/Group/Item/Shortcut. Focused composition.
name: command
title: Command

description: Displays a menu of actions triggered by a right click; contextual actions on an item/row. Full surface; Label is a plain styled div.
name: context-menu
title: Context Menu

description: Composed data table (composed set). Also data-table-header.tsx, data-table-cell.tsx.
name: data-table-cell
title: Data Table Cell

description: Composed data table (composed set). Also data-table-header.tsx, data-table-cell.tsx.
name: data-table-header
title: Data Table Header

description: Composed data table (composed set). Also data-table-header.tsx, data-table-cell.tsx.
name: data-table
title: Data Table

description: A date picker component; pick a single date or range in forms. Composes calendar + popover + button.
name: date-picker
title: Date Picker

description: a window overlaid on the primary window, content underneath inert; focused tasks/forms needing confirmation
name: dialog
title: Dialog

description: A panel that slides in from an edge of the screen; mobile sheets, filters, side forms. side (Dialog-based). drawer/header, /footer compose.
name: drawer
title: Drawer

description: Displays a menu of actions or functions, triggered by a button; action/overflow menus. Full DropdownMenu* surface. dropdown-menu/item, /group-label, /overflow, /decoration compose.
name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu

description: A centred empty/zero-state — optional media, title, body, and action slot. Compound (shadcn-faithful): Empty, EmptyHeader, EmptyMedia, EmptyTitle, EmptyDescription, EmptyContent. Media variant: icon (default) · default. EmptyContent is the action slot (composes real Buttons).
name: empty
title: Empty

description: Form control sized for a data-table cell (sm). inputType selects the control: text field | select | search | date | switch | checkbox | radio | textarea. Reuses kit form primitives. v1.1.
name: form-table-cell
title: Form Table Cell

description: A card that previews a linked item on hover/focus. HoverCard/Trigger/Content. Surface = --ds-color-popover.
name: hover-card
title: Hover Card

description: Accessible one-time-password input with copy-paste; verification/2FA code entry. size; input-otp lib. input-otp/slot → InputOTPSlot.
name: input-otp
title: Input Otp

description: displays a form input field; single-line text entry in forms
name: input
title: Input

description: A flexible, composable row for displaying content in a structured layout; list rows, option rows, settings entries. variant. item/decoration-left|right compose.
name: item
title: Item

description: Keyboard shortcut display. Kbd renders one key; pair with + separator for combos.
name: kbd
title: Kbd

description: A text hyperlink (the kit's answer to shadcn variant=link, since Button has none); inline navigation in text. variant + size.
name: link
title: Link

description: A horizontal bar of menus. Menubar/Menu/Trigger/Content/Item/Separator/Group/Label/Sub/SubTrigger/SubContent.
name: menubar
title: Menubar

description: A horizontal menu whose triggers reveal a shared floating panel. NavigationMenu/List/Item/Trigger/Content/Link/Viewport/Indicator.

title: Navigation Menu

description: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links; page through long lists/tables. Pagination/Content/Item/Link/Previous/Next/Ellipsis.

title: Pagination

description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button; small floating forms, info, pickers. Popover/Trigger/Content/Close/Title/Description.
name: popover
title: Popover

description: Rounded track + indicator with optional label row. value (0–100). Progress.
name: progress
title: Progress

description: A labeled radio control; when the radio needs an inline label/description. variant + size.
name: radio-button
title: Radio Button

description: a set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked; choose one from a small visible set
name: radio-group
title: Radio Group

description: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts; split views and adjustable panes (react-resizable-panels).
name: resizable

description: Augments native scroll for custom, cross-browser styling; wrap scrollable regions with styled scrollbars.
name: scroll-area
title: Scroll Area

description: A search input specialization (an Input with a search affordance); filter lists/tables, global search. size.
name: search
title: Search

description: displays a list of options to pick from, triggered by a button; single-choice selection in forms
name: select
title: Select

description: Visually or semantically separates content; between sections, list items, toolbar groups. orientation.
name: separator
title: Separator

description: A composable, themeable sidebar component; primary app navigation. Sidebar* + useSidebar. sidebar/item, /item-sub, /item-collapsed, /group-label compose.
name: sidebar
title: Sidebar

description: Muted, pulsing placeholder. Skeleton (set className for size).
name: skeleton
title: Skeleton

description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range; volume, ranges, numeric tuning. slider/marker composes.
name: slider
title: Slider

description: An opinionated toast component for React; transient success/error notifications. Toaster + toast().
name: sonner
title: Sonner

description: a control that toggles between checked and not checked; instant on/off settings (no submit)
name: switch
title: Switch

description: A responsive table component; display rows/columns of data. Table/Header/Body/Footer/Head/Row/Cell/Caption.
name: table
title: Table

description: layered sections of content displayed one at a time; switch between related views in the same space
name: tabs
title: Tabs

description: displays a form textarea; multi-line text entry (comments, notes)
name: textarea
title: Textarea

description: A time field (native type="time" styled shell); enter a time of day. size.
name: time-input
title: Time Input

description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off; segmented / multi-toggle controls. ToggleGroup (type, size) + ToggleGroupItem.
name: toggle-group
title: Toggle Group

description: A two-state button that can be either on or off; a single toggleable option (e.g. bold). variant + size.
name: toggle
title: Toggle

description: A popup that displays information when an element gets focus or is hovered; short hints on icons/controls. Tooltip/Trigger/Content. ⓘ trigger 2115:1280.
name: tooltip
